title: LatroX Fabric 2
body:
Super fast, tech-heavy and BIG (400+ Mods) Minecraft 1.20.1 Fabric Modpack.
Also includes many Tools, Food-Stuff, Magic,...

The Goal is to build the biggest TECH Modpack with many features and chill difficulty.

Included Mods:

Ad Astra
Adorn
Alloy Forgery
Applied Energistics 2
Bank Storage
Botania
Botany Pots (including Addons)
Farmers Delight (including Addons)
Farming for Blockheads
Cooking for Blockheads
Energized Power
Extractinator
Growable Ores
Industrial Revolution
and many many more
